scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix realtime
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix realtime run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test:run && npm --prefix backend run test:run && npm --prefix realtime run test:run
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage && npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix realtime run test:coverage
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build:verify && npm --prefix backend run build:verify && npm --prefix realtime run build:verify
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
